translations.name: Attainable® Savings Plan (ABLE Account)
translations.description: The Attainable® Savings Plan helps people with disabilities save money — without losing their SSI or Medicaid benefits. It's an ABLE account, which is a tax-free way to save. The funds help pay for disability-related costs like housing, transportation, health care, and education. To qualify, your disability must have begun before age 46, and you must qualify via SSI/SSDI, blindness, or a qualifying medical condition.
translations.website_description: A tax-free savings account for people with disabilities. Does not affect SSI or Medicaid.
